char_overview: 色彩阶 titled 猩红迷雾, 2科 director. Spent fifteen years as a 游魂 in the American Southwest before returning to Japan.
char_looks: Gray short hair, disheveled. Red, half-lidded, sharpens in blood mist eyes. White shirt, brown vest, worn boots. Red bandana. 朱殷, paired six-shot revolvers. A fixed blade runs beneath each barrel. Within blood mist, chambers auto-load blood bullets.
char_flaws: Shirks all admin. Reckless to self-destruction. Keeps people at a distance.
char_abilities: 灵力回路-猩红迷雾: Releases blood as mist through an open wound. The mist extends his circulatory system, pulsing with heartbeat. Within: instant translocation, blood constructs, 360-degree perception. Blood and 灵力 mutually convertible. Dissipates when wounds seal or 灵力 exhausts.
char_mission: Let 左恕 run the department. Find a fight worth bleeding for.

char_relationships.左恕: Does every duty he ignores. Pushes paperwork, he deflects. In blood mist, she commands, he becomes the weapon. Neither says she is why 2科 functions.
